emails.subject: Info on California Gas Initiatives
emails.body: Info on California Gas Initiatives Who has been looking after our interest in the CA PUC competition intiatives for Socal/SDG&E and PG&E? I am looking for a good summary of where we are to date (cliff notes!). Please advise. Regards, Stephanie

emails.subject: Info on California Gas Initiatives
emails.body: Just checking to see if you were able to identify gas person for me Have you been able to identify someone who has been active in intrastate proceedings? Thanks! Forwarded by Stephanie Miller/Corp/Enron on 12/05/2000 02:13 PM Stephanie Miller 11/29/2000 10:53 AM
